stanceMaxQuote.text: We're a cutting-edge technology company, constantly taking on new challenges in the worlds of milliseconds and terabytes. We need help from people who like to move fast, tackle the big stuff, and have an immediate impact. Sound like you?
stanceMaxQuote.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

stanceMaxQuote.text: Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection. Explore our featured roles and join our mission to build the future of human connection.
stanceMaxQuote.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

stanceMinQuote.text: Teamwork drives innovation, cultivates human connection and supports constant learning. Whatever role each of us plays — engineer, analyst, strategist, designer — our best work comes through collaboration and combining our collective skills. Build the next generation of AI openly and responsibly Meta is all in on building the future of AI with Llama, our open-source collection of models. Llama tur
stanceMinQuote.heading: Our best ideas happen together

topQuotes.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

topQuotes.text: Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection.
topQuotes.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

topQuotes.text: Come work alongside passionate individuals who are excited to learn and love what they do.
topQuotes.heading: Collaborate and connect to drive new ideas

topQuotes.text: We do more than make great technologies — we create awe and inspiration. AI is influencing the metaverse in mind-blowing ways and we’re staying a step ahead. From our Llama collection of open-source large language models to immersive virtual reality headsets and Ray-Ban Meta glasses, we’re making our vast world feel smaller and more connected.
topQuotes.heading: We build awesome things

topQuotes.text: We’re building more than future technology — we’re building a community of creators and developers. Our signature events connect us with the wider Meta community to explore tomorrow’s tech and inspire big ideas.
topQuotes.heading: Engage with big ideas and brilliant people

stanceMaxQuote.text: Meta Ray-Ban Display and Meta Neural Band are redefining the way people connect. This breakthrough tech allows people to answer messages, capture high-quality audio and video, and use Meta AI on a private in-lens display with intuitive, on-wrist controls — proving what's possible when you push the limits of AI in wearables. Meta Ray-Ban Display and Meta Neural Band are redefining the way people co
stanceMaxQuote.heading: We build awesome things

stanceMinQuote.text: Muse Spark powers Meta AI with natively multimodal reasoning, visual chain of thought and multi-agent orchestration. topQuotes.heading: We build awesome things

topQuotes.text: From Oakley Meta Vanguard to Oakley Meta HTSN, this is the next evolution of AI glasses. Oakley and Meta have joined forces to bring AI glasses to sports and everyday lifestyles, combining Oakley's eye-catching style with Meta's innovative wearable and AI technology. Built for life on the field, trail, or track, with everyday use cases, Oakley Meta is here to evolve sport and enhance performance.
topQuotes.heading: We build awesome things
